balance.asset_not_found: Ị nweghị usoro ntụkwasị obi maka {{asset}}.

history.more: Zaghachi HISTORY MORE iji hụ mbufe ochie
history.no_more: Enweghị mbufe ndị ọzọ a ga-egosi.
history.not_funded: Enweghị akụkọ mbufe — etinyebeghị ego na obere akpa gị n'oge a
history.unavailable: Akụkọ mbufe adịghị ugbu a. Biko gbalịa ọzọ ma emechaa.

send.usage: Ojiji: SEND <ọnụọgụ> <@aha_ojiji ma ọ bụ ekwentị>
send.no_recipient: Njehie: Ahụghị obere akpa maka onye ọrụ {{target}}.

request.usage: Ojiji: REQUEST <ọnụọgụ> <@aha_ojiji ma ọ bụ ekwentị>
request.notify_recipient: 🔔 [REQUEST] {{sender}} na-arịọ {{amount}} XLM n'aka gị. Zaghachi na: SEND {{amount}} {{senderPhone}}

join_group.success: ✅ Ị sonyela n'otu ahụ nke ọma!

invite_member.usage: Ojiji: INVITE MEMBER <@aha_ojiji ma ọ bụ ekwentị>
invite_member.not_creator: Njehie: Ọ bụghị gị mepụtara otu ọ bụla.
invite_member.notify_recipient:
🔔 [INVITE] {{sender}} kpọrọ gị ka ị sonye n'otu nchekwa ego ha "{{groupName}}".

Zaghachi na: JOIN GROUP {{groupId}}

contribute.no_group: Njehie: Ị nọghị n'otu ọ bụla.
contribute.amount_mismatch: ❌ Ntinye ụtụ ga-abụ kpọmkwem {{required}} XLM dịka otu a chọrọ.
contribute.initiating: [CONTRIBUTE] Na-ebido ntinye ụtụ nke {{amount}} XLM na "{{groupName}}"...

validation.invalid_format: ❌ Ụdị ọnụọgụ adịghị mma. Biko tinye nọmba karịrị efu (dịka, 10 ma ọ bụ 10.50).
validation.precision_exceeded: ❌ Ọnụọgụ enweghị ike inwe karịa mkpụrụ 7 mgbe akara iri gasịrị.
validation.exceeds_max: ❌ Ọnụọgụ karịrị nke kachasị anabata (1,000,000 XLM).

withdraw.no_group: Njehie: Ị nọghị n'otu ọ bụla.
withdraw.success: ✅ Ewepụtara {{amount}} XLM na nchekwa "{{groupName}}" nke ọma! (MOCKED)

help.text:
*Iwu Kolo:*

_Akaụntụ_
BALANCE
BALANCE <akụ>
HISTORY
PROFILE

_Ịkwụ Ụgwọ_
SEND <ọnụọgụ> <@onye_ọrụ>
REQUEST <ọnụọgụ> <@onye_ọrụ>

_Otu Nchekwa Ego_
CREATE GROUP <aha> <ọnụọgụ> <oge>
JOIN GROUP <groupId>
INVITE MEMBER <@onye_ọrụ>
GROUP STATUS
CONTRIBUTE <ọnụọgụ>
WITHDRAW <ọnụọgụ>

_Nkwado_
HELP
SUPPORT

unknown.command: Aghọtaghị m iwu ahụ. Ziga HELP iji hụ iwu ndị dị adị.

language.current: Asụsụ gị ugbu a bụ: {{current}}. Zaghachi na LANGUAGE <yoruba/pidgin/french/hausa/igbo/english> iji gbanwee ya.
language.unsupported: A naghị akwado asụsụ a. Biko họrọ n'ime: yoruba, pidgin, french, hausa, igbo, english.

wallet.usdc_trustline_low_reserve: Ị chọrọ opekata mpe 2 XLM na obere akpa gị iji mee ka USDC rụọ ọrụ.
